summary: Named launchd jobs local.claude-notify.YYYYMMDDHHmm (fire time, zero-padded)
context: Rewrote notify-me skill Workflow 2 to use launchd instead of `at`/`sleep`. Added Workflow 3 (list pending notifications) and Workflow 4 (cancel a notification). Bumped plugin version 1.0.29 → 1.0.30.
rationale: self-describing, sortable, and consistent across Claude sessions so any instance can list or cancel jobs created by another.
